title: Just Enough Botania
description: This simple addon adds useful information for Botania in JEI and EMI!
body:
![Botania JEI Title](https://i.ibb.co/pryKgL0g/image.png)

# This simple addon adds useful information for Botania in JEI:

Pure Daisy recipe tab now displays the amount of seconds required to craft:

  ![pure daisy jei](https://i.imgur.com/9k9Xf0l.png)  

Mana Pool recipe tab now displays the amount of mana required to craft:

  ![mana infusion jei](https://i.imgur.com/g3ZeDUb.png)  

Runic Altar tab also displays amount of mana:

![runic altar jei](https://i.imgur.com/U1UeJjC.png)

And Terrestrial Agglomeration tab:

![terrestrial agglomeration jei](https://i.imgur.com/Nb7PSif.png)

**Requirements:**

 **For 1.12.2**

   > Requires MixinBooter

   > Requires Botania

   > Requires JEI

 **For 1.16.5 or above**

   > Simply requires Botania

   > and JEI
